description: A color outdoor photograph at the White House. At a lectern bearing the presidential seal, a bald man in glasses and a dark suit with a floral tie speaks with his mouth open and one hand pointing. To the right stand a woman in a yellow dress with her head bowed and eyes closed, and a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit and blue tie also standing with head slightly bowed. Behind them are several people, including a man in a black clerical hat and robes, and white colonnade columns.
notable_text: SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES
